    F

    Favourite - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity
    JPA entity recording a song that a user has marked as a favourite.
    Favourite() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity.Favourite
     
    FavouriteRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Favourite entities.
    favourites() - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.EmptyStateConfig
     
    favouriteService() - Method in record class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.LibraryHandler
    Returns the value of the favouriteService record component.
    FavouriteService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
    Manages the current user's favourited songs.
    FavouriteService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.FavouriteService
     
    FavouritesViewBuilder - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Builds the Favourites screen, displaying songs the current user has marked as favourites sorted by the date they were added.
    FavouritesViewBuilder(LibraryHandler) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.FavouritesViewBuilder
    Constructs a FavouritesViewBuilder.

    Filters albums by a selected genre.
    filterSongsByGenre(List, Genre) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.GenreFilterService
    Filters songs by a selected genre.
